goal: Fix import-resolver project-membership check: relative import targets that exist on disk (incl. .js->.ts extension mapping) must resolve as in-project edges, eliminating the 833 false relative_target_not_in_project unresolved edges. Rolling Phase-2 program: later phases fix Node-builtin misclassification (STUB-QT400D), tag test-origin edges + src-only counts (STUB-K5YBFN), and add probableBuiltinMember evidence flags (STUB-XX4JBC).

Fix project-membership check in import-resolver: extension-aware membership (.js/.mjs/.cjs specifier -> .ts/.tsx on-disk) using the same mapping the resolver already applies for path resolution; no locked-enum changes

npx vitest full suite green (no ollama contention running)
